description: Create a weekly GitHub Actions workflow named ptf-ebpf-kernels-weekly that runs every Sunday at 1:17 am UTC. The workflow should only trigger for the main branch of the p4lang/p4c repository. It should use a ubuntu-latest environment and run a matrix of jobs for different kernel versions (5.8, 5.11, 5.13, 5.15) on ubuntu-20.04. For each job, check out the repository, set up ccache, cache a VM image, prepare the runner, build the VM if necessary, build the project with Docker, install the VM, and run PTF tests for the eBPF backend.
